scripts.prisma:migrate: docker compose -f ../docker-compose.yml run --rm -e DATABASE_URL="postgresql://songrer:songrer_password@postgres:5432/songrer?schema=public&sslmode=disable" api npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.prisma:deploy: docker compose -f ../docker-compose.yml run --rm -e DATABASE_URL="postgresql://songrer:songrer_password@postgres:5432/songrer?schema=public&sslmode=disable" api npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.prisma:seed: docker compose -f ../docker-compose.yml run --rm -e DATABASE_URL="postgresql://songrer:songrer_password@postgres:5432/songrer?schema=public&sslmode=disable" api npx prisma db seed
